---
title: "HyBF: A Hybrid Branch Fusion Strategy for Code Size Reduction"
date: 2023-02-20
year: 2023
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3578360.3580267"
venue: "CC 2023"
code: "https://doi.org/10.6084/m9.figshare.21976358.v1"
slides: "files/slides/cc2023.pdf"
preprint: ""
video: ""
author:
  - name: Rodrigo Rocha
  - name: Charitha Saumya
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Pavlos Petoumenos
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
  - name: Michael O'Boyle
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
